headline: Friday's your trap: lock in discipline before the weekend.
summary: You're 147 days behind because Fridays derail you. Today, eliminate emotional snacking and complete 45 minutes rowing to rebuild momentum.
details: Eat only Huel-portioned meals today—no processed foods, no snacking. Hit the rowing machine for 45 minutes and build the deficit you need. Friday is where your week dies or thrives: stay locked in today, and you reset your weekend pattern tomorrow.
